text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Hi, Trainer. Let's have a good session.
choice_data_list: You don't seem like yourself today.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well... I gave a student that was reading comics in
class a warning today.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But then she started crying. I guess I was too loud
and I scared her... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I can't consider other people's feelings, I'm not
fit to be head of the disciplinary committee... I'm
so ashamed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is feeling down after
unintentionally upsetting another student.
